name: codex-chatgpt-control
description: Control visible ChatGPT Chat and Work from Codex with verified configuration, task progress, files, artifacts, and safe blockers.

interface.shortDescription: Delegate to visible ChatGPT Chat or Work with verified controls, progress, files, and artifacts
interface.longDescription: ChatGPT Surface Control lets Codex agents work with the visible ChatGPT Chat and Work experiences. It supports surface detection, verified configuration, user-directed prompts, thread and Work-task continuation, progress polling, steering, file attachments, visible artifacts and downloads, Markdown response capture, redacted reports, and structured blockers. It retains legacy mode and Pro-consult aliases, but does not bypass ChatGPT login, call hidden endpoints, read cookies, or replace the OpenAI API or official Codex SDK.
defaultPrompt: Delegate this review to the most appropriate visible ChatGPT surface.
Start a visible Work task and report progress without duplicate submission.
Continue the ChatGPT thread open in Chrome.
